subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Time and again hast thou attained unto the remembrance of God. I swear by the Sun of inner meanings that whosoever this Day with certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی مره بعد مره بذکر الهی فائز شدی قسم بافتاب معانی هر نفسی الیوم بیقین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
